name: Logon/Logoff Activity
description: Tracks all authentication events including successful/failed logons, logoff, session activity, and explicit credential use. Logon Type field is critical: 2=Interactive, 3=Network, 4=Batch, 5=Service, 7=Unlock, 8=NetworkCleartext, 9=NewCredentials, 10=RemoteInteractive, 11=CachedInteractive.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

correlation_rules.name: Brute Force Detection
correlation_rules.description: 5+ failed logons (4625) from same source within 5 minutes

event_descriptions.4624: Successful account logon — check LogonType field
event_descriptions.4625: Failed account logon — check FailureReason and LogonType
